description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, dependencies and generate, and a global before_script that configures git user.email and user.name. Add a dependencies job in the dependencies stage that uses the image $BASE_IMAGE_TAG, runs only on scheduled pipelines, and executes git checkout master, .bin/dependencies.sh, git add ., git status, git commit -m "Retrieved latest dependencies" || echo "No changes to commit", and git push. Add a generate_go job in the generate stage that uses the image $GO_IMAGE_TAG, runs on the master branch but not on schedules, and runs mkdir -p ~/.ssh, ssh-keyscan gitlab.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts, echo "$PUB_DEPLOY" > ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub, echo "$PRV_DEPLOY" > ~/.ssh/id_ed25519, chmod 400 ~/.ssh/*, git submodule sync --recursive, git submodule update --init --recursive --remote, prototool generate --debug, cd .out/go, git checkout master, git add ., git commit -m "$GENERATED_COMMIT_MESSAGE" || echo "No changes to commit", and git push. Define variables BASE_IMAGE_TAG, BUILDER_BASE_IMAGE, GO_IMAGE_TAG, PROTOTOOL_VERSION, GENERATED_COMMIT_MESSAGE as shown.
